data.title: 国际服网页活动「Panopticon Institution Exclusive Disclosure」
data.summary: [Web Event] Confidential information about Unidentified Intelligent Creature from Panopticon Institu
data.body:
[Web Event]

Confidential information about Unidentified Intelligent Creature from Panopticon Institution has been acquired!
Please log in for further details and also don't forget the pyroxenes prepared for you!

🗓️Period: 3/18(Fri) 03:00 ~ 3/21(Mon) 09:59 (UTC)
#BlueArchive
